candidate_definition_hints.text: RayLLM - LLMs on Ray (Archived). Read README for more info.

This repository has been archived and is no longer maintained. We have created [`ray.serve.llm`](https://docs.ray.io/en/latest/serve/llm/overview.html) and [`ray.data.llm`](https://docs.ray.io/en/latest/data/working-with-llms.html) APIs to simplify deployment of LLMs on top of […
